_help.pollInterval: Seconds between ccusage polls. Minimum 5. Default 30.
_help.mode: Display mode. Currently 'full' (compact/ultra planned for M3).
_help.theme: Widget theme: 'dark', 'light', or 'glass'. Also cycled by the palette icon.
_help.position: Last window position in physical pixels. Updated automatically when you drag the widget.
_help.limit: Your 5-hour token cap. Set a positive number to show % + progress bar. Use null to hide % (Anthropic tunes the real limit server-side, so it is never guessed).
_help.thresholds: Percent at which the bar turns yellow (warn) and red (danger).
